challenge.title: Korak 55
challenge.description:
Ispod vašeg poslednjeg p elementa, kreirajte još jedan p element sa tekstom Sodium 160mg 7%. Stavite Sodium i 7% svaki u svoj span sa klasom od bold kao što ste uradili sa ostalima.

Zatim, dodajte dodatni span element oko Sodium 160mg za ponovno poravnanje.

challengeFiles.name: index

challengeFiles.name: styles

tests.text: You should create a new p element at the end of your .daily-value element.
Your new p element should have the text Sodium 160mg 7%.
Your new p element should have three span elements.
The span around Sodium should have the class attribute set to bold.
The span element around 7% should have the class attribute set to bold.

* The % Daily Value (DV) tells you how much a nutrient in a serving of food contributes to a daily diet. 2,000 calories a day is used for general nutrition advice.
